MYFIRSTCHARACTER-STRIKE_DANGER.title: Strike
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-DEFEND_DANGER.title: Defend
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.description:
#Draw !C! cards.
Place 1 card from your *Hand on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.title: Reorganize
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-TWINKLE.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Gain !B! *Block.
At the end of your turn, if this is at the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-TWINKLE.title: Twinkle
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-INSTABILITY.description: At the start of your turn, add an *Enchantment to 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-INSTABILITY.title: Instability
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FORCEFIELD.description: #Whenever you add a card to your *Draw Pile*, gain {ForcefieldPower:diff()} *Block.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FORCEFIELD.title: Forcefield
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-MAKE_NOISE.description:
#ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} *Strength this turn.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-MAKE_NOISE.title: Make Noise
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-MAKE_NOISE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FLIRT.title: Flirt
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SCRAP.description: #*Exhaust the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. +Draw 1 card.+
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SCRAP.title: Scrap
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-YANK.title: Yank
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-PATCH_UP.title: Patch Up
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-BITE.title: Bite
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SHOTS.description:
#If this is the first card you play this turn apply {DemisePower:diff()} *Demise to ALL enemies.
Randomize the cost of all cards in your *Hand this turn.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SHOTS.title: Shots
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REPOSITIONING_STRIKE.de: #Deal !D! damage. This card's cost is equal to its position in your [gold]Hand[/gold]+-1+.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RATS.title: Rats
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RAT_FORM.description: #At the start of your turn, apply {CharmPerTurn:diff()} Charm to ALL enemies.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RAT_FORM.title: Rat Form
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-EYEROLL.description: #*Charmed enemies deal 50% less damage this turn.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CHARMING_STRIKE.title: Charming Strike
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-BRAMBLE.title: Bramble
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CLARITY.description: #Put a card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CLARITY.title: Clarity
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CLARITY.selectionScreen: Choose a card to put back into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RESEARCH.description: #Exhaust a -random -card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The cost of a random card in your *Hand becomes 0 [E] for the rest of combat.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RESEARCH.title: Research
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-NEVER_PUNISHED.descript: #At the beginning of your turn, apply one random buff or debuff to EVERYONE.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-NEVER_PUNISHED.title: Never Punished
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-STRUCTURED_CHAOS.descri: #Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-STRUCTURED_CHAOS.title: Structured Chaos
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-BUNKER_UP.description:
#Gain !B! [gold]Block[/gold].
Put the next card you play this turn on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-BUNKER_UP.title: Bunker Up
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-ECHOLALIA.description:
#Deal !D! damage. Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-ECHOLALIA.title: Echolalia
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CLIMB.description:
#Gain {Increase:diff()} *Strength.
Double the amount of *Strength this card gains. Increase this card's cost by 1.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-CLIMB.title: Climb
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-THUMBS_DOWN.description: #Deal !D! damage. Add a Scrap to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
